title: Diiwaanka Hantidhawrka
emptySearchMessage: Ma jiraan dhacdooyin la mid ah "{search}"
emptyRetail: Weli ma jiraan hagaajin kayd, celin lacag ah ama isbeddel shaqaale.
emptyRepair: Weli lama diiwaangelin isbeddel xaalad shaqo ama dhaqdhaqaaq qaybo.
emptyFactory: Weli ma jiraan gudbin qabasho ama ansixin.
emptyLogistics: Weli lama diiwaangelin cusboonaysiin xaalad xirmo.
emptySalon: Weli ma jiraan macaamillo, shaqaale ama dhacdooyin qooddi.
emptyRestaurant: Weli ma jiraan macaamillo ama dhacdooyin qooddi.
emptyAll: Weli ma jiraan dhacdooyin hantidhawr. Dhacdooyinka si toos ah ayaa loo diiwaangeliyaa marka kooxdaadu shaqeyneyso.
